scripts.check: pnpm run check:js && pnpm run check:links
scripts.purge: purgecss --css dist/css/base.css dist/css/utils.css dist/quiz/components/quiz-shell.css --content 'dist/**/*.html' 'dist/**/*.js' --output dist/css/ --safelist /^qz-/ /^tl-/ /^bi/ show is-correct is-incorrect is-locked hidden is-active is-selected is-fallback is-open is-expanded is-visible dark fade
